name: SIMKL
author: Chronicle Contributors
description: Metadata for Movies, TV, and Anime from SIMKL. Requires a free SIMKL API Client ID.
fixMatchHint: Enter SIMKL ID, IMDB ID (tt...), or SIMKL URL.

background_tasks.description: One-time full import of your entire SIMKL watch history, ratings, and watchlist.
background_tasks.run_confirmation_message: This pulls your full SIMKL history and may take several minutes. Existing records will not be duplicated.

background_tasks.description: Pulls new watch events, ratings, and watchlist changes from SIMKL since the last sync.
